title: pneumonanthe villosa
intro: Pneumonanthe villosa, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pneumonanthe villosa include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce congestion, and promote a healthy respiratory system. Herbal preparations of Lungwort include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for respiratory health.
